name: Let Me Get That For You

system.description: When somebody drops something, you may roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
you create dozens of
duplicates, each of which could pass as the
original to even a trained eye. These duplicates
can have a built-in flaw that renders them
harmless, toothless, or otherwise useless
compared to the original: you decide what.
outcomes.every3rd3:
you may force someone
else to drop something they’re holding (your
choice) and repeat the effect of a success.
outcomes.failure:
you create far too many
duplicates, rapidly overwhelming (and likely
causing Harm to) you and anyone else in
the room. The original object returns to the
hand of the person that dropped it, and
they’re in just the right position to use it.

improvement.question: I believe you can't make an omelette...

answer1.text: Without first breaking a few eggs.

answer2.text: Without eggs, butter, milk, salt, pepper, swiss cheese, mushrooms, tomatoes, and saffron.
